scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.copy:client: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$src='client/dist'; $dest='electron/app/client/dist'; if (Test-Path 'electron/app/client') { Remove-Item 'electron/app/client' -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dest -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path \"$src\*\" -Destination $dest -Recurse -Force"
scripts.dist: npm run build:client && npm run copy:client && npm run check:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.dist:publish: npm run build:client && npm run copy:client && npm run check:renderer && cd electron && npm run publish
scripts.check:renderer: powershell -Command "cd electron/app/client/dist; if (Test-Path 'index.html') { Write-Host '✔ index.html FOUND'; Get-Item 'index.html' | Select-Object Name, Length } else { Write-Host '❌ index.html NOT FOUND' }"
